<!-- Generated by agents-reverse-engineer v1.2.8 -->

# src/orchestration

Orchestrates two-phase AI-driven documentation generation (file analysis → directory aggregation) with concurrency pooling, progress tracking, quality validation, and NDJSON tracing for multi-worker task coordination.

## Contents

### Core Orchestrator

**[orchestrator.ts](./orchestrator.ts)** — `DocumentationOrchestrator` unifies `are generate` and `are update` workflows: `createPlan()` builds `GenerationPlan` with file/directory tasks after filtering existing `.sum`/`AGENTS.md` artifacts via `sumFileExists()`/`isGeneratedAgentsMd()`, implements dirty propagation via `markDirtyWithAncestors()` to mark ancestor directories needing regeneration; `preparePlan()` for updates compares `content_hash` from `.sum` frontmatter against current file hash via `computeContentHash()`, builds `UpdatePlan` with change detection results, `affectedDirs` sorted depth-descending for child-before-parent processing; `createFileTasks()` pre-builds file analysis prompts via `buildFilePrompt()` with optional `existingSum` context for incremental updates; `createDirectoryTasks()` groups files by directory, sets `directoryInfo.sumFiles` for prompt context; `buildProjectStructure()` generates compact directory tree; frontmatter mode stores `content_hash` in `.sum` YAML, no database, no run history.

### Task Execution

**[runner.ts](./runner.ts)** — `CommandRunner` executes two-phase pipeline: Phase 1 processes `fileTasks` via `runPool()`, calls `aiService.call()` with `task.userPrompt`/`systemPrompt`, writes `.sum` via `writeSumFile()` with `contentHash` from `computeContentHashFromString()`, writes `.annex.sum` via `writeAnnexFile()` if response contains `## Annex References`, caches `sourceContentCache` for quality checks, updates `PlanTracker` with checkbox markdown; post-phase-1 runs `checkCodeVsDoc()` (old-sum staleness, new-sum omissions) and `checkCodeVsCode()` at concurrency 10, builds `InconsistencyReport` via `buildInconsistencyReport()`; Phase 2 groups `directoryTasks` by depth descending, calls `buildDirectoryPrompt()` with `knownDirs` set, writes `AGENTS.md` via `writeAgentsMd()`, writes `AGENTS.<variant>.md` hub via `writeAgentsMdHub()` if variant set, writes `CLAUDE.md` pointer via `writeClaudeMdPointer()`; post-phase-2 runs `checkPhantomPaths()` on all `AGENTS.md` files; returns `RunSummary` with `version` from `getVersion()`, tokens/duration/error metrics, quality counts; `stripPreamble()` removes LLM preamble via `\n---\n` separator or bold line pattern; `extractPurpose()` skips header/separator/preamble lines, strips bold wrappers, truncates to 120 chars; `executeUpdate()` runs Phase 1 only for changed files, no directory regen.

### Concurrency Control

**[pool.ts](./pool.ts)** — `runPool<T>(tasks, options, onComplete)` implements shared-iterator pattern to execute N async tasks in parallel without batch-idle: workers pull from `tasks.entries()` iterator, start new task immediately when prior completes, avoiding `Promise.all` batch anti-pattern where workers idle waiting for slowest task; `PoolOptions` configures `concurrency`, `failFast`, `tracer`, `phaseLabel`, `taskLabels`; `TaskResult<T>` correlates result to original task position via `index`, may be sparse if aborted; abort flag checked before pulling next task when `failFast` enabled; emits `worker:start`, `task:pickup` (with `taskLabel`, `activeTasks` counter), `task:done` (with `durationMs`, `success`, `error`), `worker:end` (with `tasksExecuted` count).

### Progress Reporting

**[progress.ts](./progress.ts)** — `ProgressReporter` tracks file/directory processing with moving average ETA: `onFileStart()` outputs `[X/Y] ANALYZING path`, `onFileDone()` outputs `[X/Y] DONE path Xs in/out tok model ~ETA` and updates `completionTimes` window (size 10), `onFileError()` outputs `[X/Y] FAIL path error`, `onDirectoryStart()`/`onDirectoryDone()` handle directory tasks with separate `dirCompletionTimes` window, `printSummary()` displays aggregated `RunSummary` metrics (version, processed/failed/skipped counts, tokens, cache read/creation, files read with unique dedup, time, errors, retries); `ProgressLog` mirrors console output to `.agents-reverse-engineer/progress-{cmd}-{backend}-{model}-{ts}.log` via promise-chain serialization, `write()` appends stripped ANSI output via `stripAnsi()` regex `/\x1b\[[0-9;]*m/g`, `finalize()` closes handle, `cleanup()` retains `DEFAULT_KEEP_COUNT=20` newest logs via lexicographic sort on ISO timestamps; ETA displays after 2+ completions as `~Xs` or `~Mm Ss`.

**[plan-tracker.ts](./plan-tracker.ts)** — `PlanTracker` maintains in-memory `GENERATION-PLAN.md` markdown with checkbox updates serialized to disk: `initialize()` creates `.agents/` directory and writes initial plan file, `markDone(itemPath)` replaces `` - [ ] \`{itemPath}\` `` with `` - [x] \`{itemPath}\` `` in memory, queues disk write via `writeQueue` promise chain to prevent concurrent corruption, `flush()` awaits all queued writes; checkbox replacement pattern requires exact backtick wrapping, caller must pass paths as they appear in markdown (files as `src/cli/init.ts`, directories as `src/cli/AGENTS.md`, pointers as `CLAUDE.md`).

### Telemetry

**[trace.ts](./trace.ts)** — `ITraceWriter` interface with `emit(event)`, `finalize()`, `filePath`; `createTraceWriter(projectRoot, enabled)` returns `NullTraceWriter` when `enabled=false` (zero overhead), else `TraceWriter` writing to `.agents-reverse-engineer/traces/trace-{timestamp}.ndjson` where timestamp is ISO 8601 with colons/dots replaced by hyphens; `TraceWriter` uses promise-chain serialization for concurrent writes, maintains `seq` (monotonic counter), `nodePid`, `startHr` (from `process.hrtime.bigint()`) for `elapsedMs` calculation, lazily opens file handle on first write with `mkdir` recursive, augments `TraceEventPayload` with `seq`, `ts`, `pid`, `elapsedMs`, serializes to JSON + newline; `cleanupOldTraces()` deletes old trace files matching `trace-*.ndjson`, keeping `keepCount=500` most recent by lexicographic sort; `TraceEvent` discriminated union includes `PhaseStartEvent`, `PhaseEndEvent`, `WorkerStartEvent`, `WorkerEndEvent`, `TaskPickupEvent`, `TaskDoneEvent`, `TaskStartEvent`, `SubprocessSpawnEvent`, `SubprocessExitEvent`, `RetryEvent`, `DiscoveryStartEvent`, `DiscoveryEndEvent`, `FilterAppliedEvent`, `PlanCreatedEvent`, `ConfigLoadedEvent`.

### Type Definitions

**[types.ts](./types.ts)** — `FileTaskResult` carries per-file AI analysis outcome with `path`, `success`, `tokensIn`, `tokensOut`, `cacheReadTokens`, `cacheCreationTokens`, `durationMs`, `model`, optional `error`; `RunSummary` aggregates command execution statistics with `version`, `filesProcessed`, `filesFailed`, `filesSkipped`, `totalCalls`, `totalInputTokens`, `totalOutputTokens`, `totalCacheReadTokens`, `totalCacheCreationTokens`, `totalDurationMs`, `errorCount`, `retryCount`, `totalFilesRead`, `uniqueFilesRead`, optional `inconsistenciesCodeVsDoc`, `inconsistenciesCodeVsCode`, `dirsProcessed`, `dirsFailed`, `dirsSkipped`, `phantomPaths`, `inconsistencyReport`; `ProgressEvent` provides real-time task status updates with discriminated `type: 'start' | 'done' | 'error' | 'dir-done'`, `filePath`, `index`, `total`, optional `durationMs`, `tokensIn`, `tokensOut`, `model`, `error`; `CommandRunOptions` configures execution with `concurrency`, optional `failFast`, `debug`, `dryRun`, `tracer`, `progressLog`, `variant`.

**[index.ts](./index.ts)** — Barrel export providing public API surface: re-exports `FileTaskResult`, `RunSummary`, `ProgressEvent`, `CommandRunOptions` from `./types.js`; `runPool`, `PoolOptions`, `TaskResult` from `./pool.js`; `ProgressReporter`, `ProgressLog` from `./progress.js`; `PlanTracker` from `./plan-tracker.js`; `ITraceWriter`, `TraceEvent`, `TraceEventPayload`, `createTraceWriter`, `cleanupOldTraces` from `./trace.js`; `CommandRunner` from `./runner.js`.

## Architecture

Two-phase AI pipeline: Phase 1 analyzes source files via `aiService.call()`, writes `.sum` artifacts with `content_hash` in frontmatter, caches source content for post-analysis quality checks (`checkCodeVsDoc` detects stale docs/omissions, `checkCodeVsCode` detects cross-file inconsistencies); Phase 2 aggregates file summaries into `AGENTS.md` directory overviews, processes directories depth-descending (post-order) for child-before-parent dependency. Update workflow runs Phase 1 only, compares frontmatter `content_hash` against current file hash, re-analyzes on mismatch. Concurrency pools use shared-iterator pattern (workers pull from shared `entries()` iterator), promise-chain serialization prevents concurrent write corruption (`PlanTracker`, `ProgressLog`, `TraceWriter`), task correlation via `index` field enables result ordering. Quality checks run post-phase-1 at fixed concurrency 10 per directory group, post-phase-2 phantom path validation runs sequentially. All pools emit tracer events: `phase:start`, `phase:end`, `worker:start`/`end`, `task:pickup`/`done`.

## Behavioral Contracts

**Checkbox Pattern**: `` - [ ] \`${itemPath}\` `` → `` - [x] \`${itemPath}\` `` (exact backtick wrapping, paths as `src/cli/init.ts` for files, `src/cli/AGENTS.md` for directories, `CLAUDE.md` for pointers).

**Preamble Removal**: Strip content before `\n---\n` separator if separator appears within first 500 chars, OR strip content before bold line `**[A-Z]` if preamble <300 chars and lacks `##`.

**Purpose Extraction**: Skip lines starting with `#`, `---`, or case-insensitive prefixes `now i`, `perfect`, `based on`, `let me`, `here is`, `i'll`, `i will`, `great`, `okay`, `sure`, `certainly`, `alright`; strip bold wrappers `**...**`, truncate to 120 chars with `...` suffix.

**ANSI Stripping**: Remove escape sequences via regex `/\x1b\[[0-9;]*m/g` for plain-text log output.

**ETA Display**: Format as `~Xs` or `~Mm Ss`, display after 2+ completions, moving average over last 10 completion durations.

**Trace Timestamp**: ISO 8601 with colons/dots replaced by hyphens for filename compatibility.

**Total Input Tokens**: Computed as `tokensIn + cacheReadTokens + cacheCreationTokens`.

## Annex References

Full preamble prefix list and behavioral patterns: [runner.annex.sum](./runner.annex.sum)
